supporting_evidence: Row-local geometry remains coherent at collapse state (`firstChildToDetailDeltaY=12.000`, `belowChildToFirstChildDeltaY=34.333`) while `detailVisibleHeight=0.000`.
Collapse lifecycle completes normally (`probe.collapse.end`, `animation.complete`) with expected state transitions.
contradicting_evidence: Incident evidence shows render-path divergence: `detailFrameHeightParam=0.000` and `detailVisibleHeight=0.000` while `interpolatedOpacity` continues from 1.000 toward 0.000 during the same collapse session.
No evidence points to tentative-vs-committed state promotion mismatch in business state channels.
missing_evidence: A direct pre/post-fix render probe confirming opacity immediately resolves to 0 whenever post-gate visible height is 0 in collapse.
candidates.next_discriminating_check: Patch detail render ownership so opacity is zeroed by the same post-gate collapse container when collapsed, then re-run one collapse and verify `detailOpacityProbe` no longer reports non-zero interpolated opacity while `detailVisibleHeight=0.000`.
